content.en:
"Not good!"

The dragon girl Jin Shan's face changed drastically.

The temple formation disappeared, and those killing demon soldiers were able to rush in.

As for Ye Tian, although she thought that Ye Tian's strength was very strong, but with so many self-explosions of killing demon soldiers just now, Ye Tian might not be able to survive.

If Ye Tian died, she would be finished.

The only good news was that the target of that innate god was Ye Tian, so he didn't let those killing demon soldiers attack her for the time being.

Now, he is only determining whether Ye Tian is still alive.

Rumble!!!

A powerful aura came from the center of the explosion.

Then, a large number of fragments of the Demon Killer flew out.

"Innate gods, these killing demon soldiers are too weak to threaten me, even if they all blow themselves up, they won't be able to break through my defenses!"

Ye Tian walked out with a knife, and there was no injury on his body at all.

Obviously, these killing demon soldiers couldn't hurt Ye Tian.

At this time.

The innate gods were dumbfounded, and their eyes showed a look of fear.

"You are very strong, I admit defeat, I am willing to give you some treasures, we don't need to fight each other!"

The innate deity said.

"Kill you, your treasures will naturally be mine!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Swish!

The innate gods tried to escape, but those killing demon soldiers were manipulated by him to stop Ye Tian.

However, he far underestimated Ye Tian's strength.

"Space Confinement!"

The void instantly became like a swamp, making it difficult for the innate god to fly away.

"Tianyue Knife, go die!"

The Heavenly Moon Knife Qi slashed through the space, instantly penetrating the innate deity.

The next moment, the innate deity turned into a corpse and fell to the ground.

Although those killing demon soldiers lost their control, they also recovered their own nature and still attacked towards Ye Tian.

Boom Boom Boom !!

Ye Tian killed a group of people in one second, and quickly killed these killing demon soldiers.

After killing these killing demon soldiers, Ye Tian walked to the side of the corpse of the innate god and took the spatial storage equipment of the innate god.

As for what treasures were inside, he didn't have much time to check them now.

Swish!

Ye Tian teleported to the side of the little princess Jin Shan, a girl of the dragon clan, and said, "You are the little princess Jin Shan of the dragon clan, right?"

Jin Shan stared at Ye Tian curiously and fearfully, and asked in a low voice, "Who are you, is it my father who came to save me?" I sensed the female dragon blood jade pendant on you, and the female dragon blood jade pendant has always been in my father's hands. "

"That's good!" Ye Tian admitted: "It is true that your father asked me to save you, but I am just a deal with your father." As for who I am, it doesn't hurt to tell you, I am His Highness Wanfa from the human race. Let's go, I'll take you out!"

"Terran, Your Highness Wanfa!"

Jin Shan's pupils shrank sharply.

As a great god, she had naturally heard of His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of the Terran Race, and even often heard about His Highness the achievements of the Ten Thousand Laws from the high-level mouths of the Dragon Clan.

And the dragon clan even commented that His Highness Wanfa has most likely become a supreme-level highness, and it is definitely not an ordinary supreme-level, and even among the supreme-level highnesses, it is extremely powerful.

She thought that her strength was one of the best among the dragon clan god level, but if it was compared to a supreme-level highness, it was too far behind.

"No wonder you can sweep through those killing demon soldiers!"

Jin Shan said secretly in her heart.

"Your Highness Wanfa, can we not leave the Dusk Forbidden Land first?"

Jin Shan asked.

"No, I can't. Ye Tian said in a deep voice: "I have limited time, but I don't have time to stay in the Dusk Forbidden Land, I must bring you back to the Dragon Clan's Golden Blood Ancestral Dragon Palace, otherwise if there is an accident, I will not be able to explain!"

Jin Shan squirmed and didn't speak for a long time, as if she was hesitating, or rather tangled.

Suddenly.

Jin Shan said: "Your Highness Wanfa, in fact, I entered the Dusk Realm this time not because I was willful, but because I knew a great opportunity. It's just that he didn't want to reveal it to the other highnesses of the Dragon Clan, so he brought a group of elite god-level subordinates down. Unexpectedly, the danger of the Forbidden Land of Dusk exceeded my imagination, and all my men fell, and even most of the life-saving treasures on my body were consumed. But if I don't get that great opportunity, I'm really unwilling! I can promise that if His Highness Wanfa helps me, we will share this opportunity equally, how about it?"

"What chance?"

Ye Tian asked calmly.

"World Source Stone!"

Jin Shan said.

"What, World Source Stone, is it really fake?"

Ye Tian was moved.

The World Source Stone is almost useless to the Masters and Supremes, just a pile of useless stones, but for the Great God Level, it is precious, and it can even be said to be a priceless treasure.

The great god-level impact galaxy-level needs to open up the dantian world, and the world that is opened up is divided into quality, and the dantian world opened up by the general god-level is very general, if you use special things, you can improve the quality of the world.

For example, the Chaos Ancient Tree of Ye Tian, or the World Tree, etc., all have the effect of opening up the world and improving the quality.

The world source stone is also a treasure that improves the quality of the world, and can stabilize the foundation of the world, increase the foundation of the world, and make the dantian world indestructible.

It is rumored that if some worlds use a large number of World Source Stones, they can even shake the Supreme's attack without destroying it.

But the world source stones are also extremely precious, one or two are useless, and there are so many people at the great god level who impact the galaxy level, it is almost difficult to preserve any world source stones.

For example, the human race, there are countless great gods who need world source stones, even with his status, it is difficult to get many world source stones, and those world source stones are of little use to him.

If you want to get a large number of World Source Stones, you can only rely on your own luck.

"How many World Source Stones are there?"

Ye Tian asked.

"A lot!" Jin Shan said: "It's enough for the two of us, but it's very dangerous there, and I may not be able to get it alone, so I have to rely on you!"

"How did you learn about this?" Ye Tian asked again.

"Actually, this secret is not a secret in the eyes of the dragon clan's high-level leaders, but the Dusk Forbidden Land is very dangerous, and if the dragon clan sends a large number of great god-level mines, it will suffer serious losses. I saw it from my father's secret archives, and I thought that with my own strength and the protection of a large number of guards, I should have hope to obtain the World Source Stone. I didn't expect it...... Now it seems that it is very necessary for the Dragon Clan to seal this secret, otherwise other highnesses will definitely not listen to the dissuasion to come in, just to obtain a large number of World Source Stones!"

Jin Shan said truthfully.

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

In general, this little princess Jin Shan thinks too highly of her own strength, and she is a little overwhelmed.

"Okay, I can accompany you, but I want seventy percent of the world's source stones, otherwise the cooperation will be canceled!"

Ye Tiandao.

"What, seventy percent !!"

Jin Shan frowned tightly.

Ye Tian asked for seventy percent, then she could only get thirty percent, and thirty percent of the world's source stones were inevitably too few.

But if she doesn't agree, where would she dare to go!

She now knew the dangers of the Forbidden Lands of Twilight, and if she went there, she would almost certainly die!

"Okay, I promise!"

Jin Shan nodded in agreement.

"Okay, then you lead the way!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

He felt that this transaction was very cost-effective, after all, he could obtain a large amount of glazed golden wave liquid from the dragon clan, and he also hoped to obtain a large number of world source stones.

If he obtained a large number of World Source Stones, he could raise the quality of the Dantian World to an extremely high level.

If you get other opportunities, maybe you can take it one step further.

In short, the more treasures that can improve the quality of the world, the better.

Immediately.

Jin Shan left here with Ye Tian and went to the depths of the Dusk Forbidden Land.

Along.

The two encountered many killing demon soldiers, but they were all easily solved by Ye Tian.

When he walked somewhere, Jin Shan suddenly spoke: "Your Highness Wanfa, according to the information of the Dragon Clan, there will be undead creatures in the area ahead! The realm of these undead creatures is at the great god level, but their bodies are the corpses of some galaxy-level, galaxy-level, cosmic gods and even masters in the past, and it is very likely that a small part of the power remains, and some undead creatures can burst out of terrifying combat power in a short period of time, which is a more terrifying existence than killing demon soldiers. Before, I didn't think about it, but I can see the strength of the Demon Slayer, and I think these undead creatures are probably very difficult to entangle!"

"Just leave it to me!"

Ye Tian was very confident, so he walked in front, while Jin Shan followed behind, cautiously, lest he be attacked by undead creatures.

Not long after leaving, Ye Tian's eyebrows moved and he looked somewhere.

"There's supposed to be an undead creature coming!"

Hearing Ye Tian's words, Jin Shan became nervous.
